title: Bieluuu's hard dungeons
description: This datapack adds late-game surface-accessible dungeons with unique layouts, tough mobs, and valuable loot.
body:
![Bieluuu's Hard Dungeons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7435837e3e2c5248160fe1b3fd71064690d7d328.png)  

# 🕳️ **Late-Game Dungeons – A New Challenge Awaits**  

This datapack introduces **brand-new, challenging dungeons** designed for **late-game Minecraft players**. These structures spawn naturally with visible surface entrances—easy to find but brutally tough to conquer.  

### **Features:**  
✔️ **Unique layouts** – No two dungeons feel the same.  
✔️ **Deadly mobs & rewarding loot** – Test your skills and gear.  
✔️ **Vanilla-friendly** – No mods needed, just pure Minecraft adventure.  
✔️ **Multiplayer-ready** – Works flawlessly on servers and singleplayer.  

### **🎨 Coming Soon:**  
A **custom resource pack** with unique weapon textures to make your loot even more special! *(Optional, but highly recommended for the full experience.)*  

---

### **🔹 Credits & Thanks**  
A massive shoutout to **Timsmak**, who built nearly every structure in this datapack! Without his incredible work, this project wouldn’t exist. *(Sadly, he doesn’t have a Modrinth account, so I can’t credit him properly here.)*  

---
